title: Q: What is the problem with sending large files via the internet?
rawTranscript: यूज करना तो आप कुटी की हेल्प ले सकते हो बड़ इसका प्रॉब्लम क्या है रहे है अगर मान लो अगर कोई बोलेगा सर इमेज भेजना है या कोई आप लोगों को आउडियो फाइले, वीडियो फाइले या कुछ ओब्जेक्ट आपको भेजना है जाते होगा लोग नहीं बेश सकते क्योंकि वैल्यू कंपल क्रिक्ट होना चाहिए इट फ्रेंड पर बैक अब यू गिडिंग में ओके तो पहले ही क्लियर हो गई एक क्या होती है वन स्माल टेक्स फाइल ओके इसके अंदर की होती है स्ट्रिंग और वैल्यू होती है स्ट्रिंग सबसे पहला क्वेश्चन है यह कुकी जो भी है ओके यह बनाता को ने ये ब्राउजर क्रिएट करता क्या सर्वर क्रिएट करता है ओके, मैं इस पॉलिट पे आता हूँ नेक्स्ट उसके बाद इस कुछ होते हैं क्या वम चेक कर दे उससे पहले एक बात बताता हूँ
preGeneratedNotes:
### Q: What is the problem with sending large files via the internet?

> Sending large files such as images, audio files, or videos via the internet can be problematic because of the value compression required. This is because large files cannot be sent in their entirety, as it would exceed the friend's bandwidth.

### Q: What is a cookie and how is it created?

> A cookie is a small text file created by a browser that stores string and value pairs. It is created by the browser and sent to the server, which then creates a cookie to store the user's preferences and other information.

### Q: What is the purpose of a cookie in relation to the server?

> The cookie is used by the server to identify the user and their preferences, allowing for personalized interactions and experiences.

### Q: What happens when a user sends a request to the server?

> The user sends a request to the server, which then checks the cookie to determine the user's preferences and other information. This information is used to create a personalized response to the user's request.

### Q: What is the relationship between the cookie and the user's preferences?

> The cookie stores the user's preferences and other information, which is then used by the server to create a personalized response to the user's request.

### Q: What is the process of creating a cookie and sending it to the server?

```mermaid
graph TD
    A["Browser"] -->|Creates Cookie|> B["Cookie"]
    B -->|Sent to Server|> C["Server"]
    C -->|Processes Cookie|> D["Personalized Response"]
    D -->|Sent to Browser|> E["Browser"]
```

### Q: What is the purpose of the cookie in relation to the browser?

> The cookie is used by the browser to store the user's preferences and other information, which is then sent to the server to create a personalized response.

### Q: What is the relationship between the cookie and the user's session?

> The cookie is used to store the user's session information, allowing the server to identify the user and their preferences.
